title: Green Core 3.0 — A New Era for the Design System
content:
What's new in 3.0

Green Core 3.0 is the most significant release since the project's inception. This major version introduces a fully redesigned token architecture, a new responsive layout system, and a suite of new pattern components — all built on the battle-tested Lit web component foundation.

Breaking changes

The global CSS custom property namespace has been unified under --gds-*. All deprecated v1 aliases have been removed. Teams upgrading from 2.x should run the provided codemods to automatically migrate property references.

New components

  • Card Pattern 01 — a composable card with built-in image, title, excerpt, and footer slots, designed for content-heavy surfaces.
  • Coachmark — an overlay-based onboarding guide component.
  • Form Summary — aggregates validation messages across a form into a single accessible summary region.

Performance

Bundle size has been reduced by 18% through tree-shaking improvements in the generated React wrappers and lazy-definition of web components.
